holdings.infoBox: VDIG is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Broadcom stock at 5.67%, Microsoft at 5.12%, Eli Lilly and Company at 4.78%, Mastercard at 4.36%, and Linde at 4.32%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Wellington Dividend Growth Active ETF (VDIG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, focusing on dividend-paying companies with durable earnings growth. The fund seeks income growth and long-term capital appreciation VDIG was launched on Nov 14, 2025 and is issued by Vanguard.
